# GitHub Actions Workflows

## evidence.yml

Automated evidence capture workflow (see `docs/AUTOMATION_LAYER.md`)

**Triggers:**
- Push to main/develop
- Pull requests to main

**Captures:**
- Test coverage
- Build status
- Dependency graph
- Risk assessment

---

**Note:** Workflow file needs to be created manually when CI/CD is set up.

See template in: `docs/AUTOMATION_LAYER.md`
